## Fact-check notes
- Block (parent of Square, Cash App, Afterpay) announced it would cut its staff by 40% (Source: CNN Business, Feb 28 2026)
- The announcement sparked a wider market selloff with three separate down days tied to AI-related fears (Source: CNN Business, Feb 28 2026)
- Nvidia shares fell over 5% after quarterly earnings report failed to calm investor nerves (Source: Reuters, Mar 2 2026)
- Citrini Research published a viral blog post speculating AI agents would create a 'doom loop' replacing white-collar workers (Source: CNN Business, Mar 2 2026)
